product_overview: Gia Phả OS is an open-source, self-hosted Vietnamese family genealogy web application that lets families collaboratively manage members, relationships, events, and kinship terminology with role-based access control and rich editing features.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive, visual interface for building and exploring Vietnamese family trees (list, tree, mindmap).
Enable collaborative, role-based editing and administration while preserving data privacy via a user's Supabase instance and RLS.
Support Vietnamese-specific features: accurate kinship terminology (danh xưng), lunar calendar conversions for ngày giỗ, and seniority-aware relationship logic.
Allow reliable data portability via JSON/CSV/GEDCOM import-export and admin tools for user management.
Deliver a responsive, production-ready frontend with rich text editing, image uploads, and smooth UI transitions.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in via Supabase Auth with first-user auto-admin behavior and client-side validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Toggle between Login and Register modes -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard on successful registration
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard on successful login
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials or validation error

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public landing page with animated hero, upcoming family events preview, and navigation to public sections and login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with animations -> View upcoming family events list -> Click header link to /login -> Arrive at /login
Navigate to / -> View hero section with animations -> See loading state for upcoming family events -> See error message if events fail to load

features.name: Family Members Management
features.description: Full CRUD for family members with list, tree and mindmap views, avatar upload, rich-text notes, and integrity checks for deletions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/members -> View members in list, tree, or mindmap view -> Toggle between view modes -> Search and filter members -> Click on a member to view details -> Click edit to modify member profile -> Fill member form fields (name, birthdate, gender, etc.) -> Upload member avatar photo -> Add rich text notes using Tiptap editor -> Click Save -> See updated member details
Navigate to /dashboard/members -> Click Create New Member (navigate to /dashboard/members/new) -> Fill member form fields -> Upload member avatar photo -> Click Save -> See new member in list/tree
Navigate to /dashboard/members -> Click on a member -> Click Delete -> See validation error instructing to remove relationships first if relationships exist -> Cancel deletion

features.name: Relationship Management
features.description: Create and remove parent-child, spouse, and sibling relationships using a searchable person selector and integrity rules (no self-relationships, unique constraints).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/members -> Click on a member -> Click Add Relationship -> Search and select persons for relationships -> Select relationship type (parent-child, spouse, sibling) -> Click Save -> See relationship updated in member detail and tree

Navigate to /dashboard/members -> Click on a member -> Click Add Relationship -> Search and select persons for relationships -> Select relationship type that already exists -> Click Save -> See error message about duplicate relationship

features.name: Family Events
features.description: View and manage upcoming family events including auto-generated birthdays and lunar death anniversaries, plus custom events with CRUD operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/events -> View list of upcoming events sorted by next occurrence -> Click Create custom event -> Fill event fields (name, date, location, content) -> Click Save -> See new custom event in list
Navigate to /dashboard/events -> Click on an existing custom event -> Edit event fields -> Click Save -> See updated event in list
Navigate to /dashboard/events -> Click Create custom event -> Leave required fields blank or provide invalid date -> Click Save -> See validation error message and prevent save

features.name: Data Import/Export
features.description: Export full backups (JSON/CSV/GEDCOM) and import JSON/CSV/GEDCOM with batching; JSON import is destructive and requires confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/data -> Click export button to download JSON backup -> Confirm export action -> Download of JSON backup starts -> See success message
Navigate to /dashboard/data -> Select a JSON file to import -> Click Confirm import -> See destructive import warning -> Confirm to proceed -> See import status messages and success on completion
Navigate to /dashboard/data -> Select a malformed JSON file to import -> Click Confirm import -> See error message describing invalid file or import failure and no data change

features.name: User Management (Admin)
features.description: Admin-only interface to list users, assign roles (admin/editor/member), create users, toggle active status, and delete users with safeguards (cannot delete self).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/users -> View list of registered users with roles and active status -> Click Create New User -> Fill email, password, and select role -> Click Create -> See new user in list
Navigate to /dashboard/users -> Click on a user -> Change user role to editor -> Click Save -> See role updated in list
Navigate to /dashboard/users as non-admin -> Attempt to access user management -> See permission denied or restricted UI message

features.name: Blog Management (Admin)
features.description: Rich-text blog post editor for admins: create, edit, upload cover images, set draft/published status, and delete posts. Public posts appear on /blog.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/blog -> Click Create new blog post (navigate to /dashboard/blog/new) -> Fill title and write content using rich text editor -> Upload cover image -> Set blog status to published -> Click Save -> See new blog post in admin list
Navigate to /dashboard/blog -> Click on an existing post to edit (navigate to /dashboard/blog/[id]) -> Modify content -> Click Save -> See updated post in admin list
Navigate to /dashboard/blog -> Click Create new blog post -> Leave title empty -> Click Save -> See validation error and prevent publish

features.name: Kinship Finder
features.description: Find and display the Vietnamese kinship term and path between two members using BFS/LCA logic and seniority rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/kinship -> Select first person -> Select second person -> Click find relationship button -> View relationship path and Vietnamese kinship term with description
Navigate to /dashboard/kinship -> Select the same person for both selectors -> Click find relationship button -> See validation message instructing to select two different persons
Navigate to /dashboard/kinship -> Select two people with no connection in data -> Click find relationship button -> See 'No relationship found' message

features.name: Lineage Management
features.description: Manage and explore direct lineage branches, choose lineage roots, and view generation breakdowns for focused branch management.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/lineage -> View lineage branches list -> Select a lineage root -> View generation breakdown for selected root
Navigate to /dashboard/lineage -> Open lineage view with no persons loaded -> See empty state prompting to import or create members

features.name: Family Statistics
features.description: Dashboard of family statistics including totals, generation counts, gender distribution and age analytics visualized in charts.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/stats -> View statistics dashboard with charts and summary cards -> View generation distribution -> View gender breakdown
Navigate to /dashboard/stats -> See loading state for statistics -> See error message if statistics fail to load

features.name: Public Blog
features.description: Public listing and individual post pages for published blog posts accessible without authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog -> Browse blog post listing -> Click on a blog post -> Navigate to /blog/[slug] -> Read full content
Navigate to /blog -> Click a blog post that has been unpublished or deleted -> See 404 or 'Post not found' message

features.name: Image Upload
features.description: Upload images (avatars and blog covers) via Cloudinary endpoint (/api/upload) with client-side preview and server-side storage.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/members/new or /dashboard/blog/new -> Click image select -> Select image file -> Upload via form -> See uploaded image preview -> Click Save -> See image applied to member or blog post
Navigate to image upload form -> Select a file exceeding allowed size or unsupported type -> Click Upload -> See upload error message and prevent save

routes.description: Landing page with hero section and upcoming family events
Login and registration page with email/password authentication
About page with project information and privacy policy
Main dashboard overview with family stats
Family members list with tree and mindmap view modes
Member detail page showing full profile
Admin blog post listing and management

features.description: Login and registration with email/password via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Toggle between Login and Register modes
See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to dashboard on successful login

user_interactions: Navigate to login or other sections via header

features.name: Family Members Management

user_interactions: View members in list, tree, or mindmap view
Click on a member to view details
Click edit to modify member profile
Fill member form fields (name, birthdate, gender, etc.)
Add rich text notes using Tiptap editor

Select a JSON file to import

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase select persons + relationships (via server action)
Supabase upsert persons + insert relationships (via server action)

features.name: User Management (Admin)

features.name: Blog Management
features.description: Admin blog post creation, editing, and publishing with rich text editor
user_interactions: Write content with rich text editor

known_limitations.issue: App uses Vietnamese language throughout the UI
known_limitations.impact: All UI text, error messages, and labels are in Vietnamese

known_limitations.issue: Supabase RLS policies control data access
known_limitations.impact: Data visibility depends on user role and authentication status
